title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant Posts
description: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Consultant Positions. Those candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the NHSRC Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last...
